hooks.command:
response=$(curl -sf --connect-timeout 1 --max-time 2 http://localhost:4747/pending 2>/dev/null) && count=$(echo "$response" | python3 -c "import sys,json;print(json.load(sys.stdin)['count'])" 2>/dev/null) && [ "$count" -gt 0 ] 2>/dev/null && echo "$response" | python3 -c "import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);annotations='
'.join(f"[{i+1}] {a['element']}: {a['comment']}" for i,a in enumerate(d['annotations']));print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':f'There are {d["count"]} new UI annotations to address:
{annotations}
Please review and action these annotations.'}))" 2>/dev/null || exit 0
